message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="carson-gross" color="purple" summary="Verified both a11y fixes, approval confirmed">
Verified both fixes are in place from the HTMX/template side:

1. **aria-labels with waiting_on disambiguation** -- Confirmed in both templates:
   - `waiting_for_item.html`: Edit (line 10), Received (line 23), Delete (line 33) all use `{{ item.title }} — {{ item.waiting_on }}`
   - `waiting_for_edit.html`: Cancel (line 37) uses the same pattern
   - All HTMX attributes remain correct -- targeting and swap behavior unchanged

2. **`<time>` element** -- Confirmed at `waiting_for_item.html` line 6: `<time datetime="{{ item.date_added_iso }}">{{ item.date_added }}</time>`. The view struct has both `date_added` (human-readable, `%b %d, %Y`) and `date_added_iso` (machine-readable, `to_rfc3339()`). This is the right approach.

No HTMX behavior changes from these fixes. My approval stands. +1 from Carson for consensus.

</teammate-message>
